channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-06-06 17:02 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Last night, I read the entirety of C.S. Lewis' The Screwtape Letters. It's a novel told in the form ...
item.description: Last night, I read the entirety of C.S. Lewis' The Screwtape Letters. It's a novel told in the form of letters written by a demon to another demon instructing him on ways to manipulate his "patient" to do evil. This one quote sounded familiar.

item.title: @elonmusk: What does it feel like to be British? It feels like being a second class citizen in your own country...
item.description: What does it feel like to be British? It feels like being a second class citizen in your own country, paying for foreigners to loot and rape you, while your rulers call you evil if you complain.

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk unveiling Falcon Heavy at the National Press Club in Washington, D.C., in 2011
item.description: Elon Musk unveiling Falcon Heavy at the National Press Club in Washington, D.C., in 2011

item.title: @elonmusk: 𝕏 is strong in the east too. #1 social network of any kind in Japan.
item.description: 𝕏 is strong in the east too. #1 social network of any kind in Japan.

item.title: @elonmusk: Join our AI recommendations & advertising engineering team!
item.description: Join our AI recommendations & advertising engineering team!

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX has launched in 7 years almost as many satellites as every government and private company in ...
item.description: SpaceX has launched in 7 years almost as many satellites as every government and private company in the world did since the 50s

item.title: @elonmusk: 3-5 years for a throwing a traffic cone is wild when Hamid Safi, a Rochdale child rape gang member, ...
item.description: 3-5 years for a throwing a traffic cone is wild when Hamid Safi, a Rochdale child rape gang member, only received 4 years. This is how disposable white lives are to them.

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk explains the deeper purpose of SpaceX: "The goal of SpaceX is to build the technologies ne...
item.description: Elon Musk explains the deeper purpose of SpaceX: "The goal of SpaceX is to build the technologies necessary to make life multiplanetary" It’s not the most commercial-sounding mission but when you zoom out through the lens of history, it’s one of the most important things humanity can do becoming multiplanetary is about securing our long-term survival and expanding consciousness beyond one planet

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX was less than 10 people back then. We didn’t even have office furniture.
item.description: SpaceX was less than 10 people back then. We didn’t even have office furniture.

item.title: @elonmusk: India’s birth rate has fallen below replacement. Among those most educated, India’s birth rate fell ...
item.description: India’s birth rate has fallen below replacement. Among those most educated, India’s birth rate fell below replacement many years ago.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink enables high-speed connectivity for field manufacturing teams 🛰️❤️
item.description: Starlink enables high-speed connectivity for field manufacturing teams 🛰️❤️
